CONTACTID.TEXT: Hey Partner. What happened here?
Hey Officer, thanks for responding. A guy flipped his car. He said that another driver drifted around the corner, hit his vehicle, and ended up flipping it.
Ouch. Do you have any information on a possible suspect or the suspect's vehicle?
I can't tell you. I had to get EMS and the tow service here. Try talking to the ~y~Victim~w~ over by my vehicle. He could probably tell you what you need to know.
Okay. Thanks for the information.
That is all I can tell you.
Hey bud. I'm from the {0}. Are you okay?
Yes officer. Luckily I didn't get hurt! That fucking drifter...
Okay. Can you tell me what happened? Do you know what type of vehicle it was?
~w~ drifted around the corner and was in the middle of the road. As I was coming around, he hit me, made my vehicle flip, and sped off.
Did you see the ~y~
You bet I did! It was ~y~
Thanks for your help. It is extremely useful in this investigation.
It's a good thing that I remembered the plate! Get this son of a bitch...
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hey. You requested backup. How can I help?
Hi {0}, this crash seems to be a Hit and Run. There are tire skids in the middle of the road.
So another vehicle caused the crash?
According to the victim, it seems so. Best is that you ask him yourself. He probably can give you more information.
OK. I will talk to him.
That is all I can tell you
"Hi, I'm {0} from the {1}. Is everything fine?
Hello officer. Yes I'm fine but pretty pissed.
I can imagine that. Can you tell me what happened?
~w~ drifted around the corner and was in the middle of the road when I was coming around. I took a hit and lost control of my car and crashed.
Did you see the ~y~
Luckily, I did. It was ~y~
Perfect. Thanks. With your help we can easily identify this person.
I deserve justice for that. Hope this guy goes to prison
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hi. What happened to the taxi driver?
Hey, nice to see you. Well, the guy does not really want to talk to the police. So I don't have much.
Hm. Does he have an active warrant? Tell me what you have
I already checked that, he is clean. Seems to be a Hit and Run. But try talking to him yourself. It was really hard get something out of him.
Okay. Thanks for the information.
That is all I can tell you.
Hello Sir, I'm from the {0}. Is everything okay
Hey, yes I'm fine.
Sir, is it possible for you to describe what happened?
~w~ hit me.
Did you see the ~y~
I shouldn't tell you... I hate cops... they suck. But... it was ~y~
Thank you. Why do you hate the police
That is none of your business. Get this asshole and leave me alone.
Leave me alone.
Hey Officer. What happened here?
Hello Officer. Thanks for responding. The only thing I know is that we have a hit and run between a motorist and a bicyclist.
Okay. Do you have any information on a possible vehicle or suspect?
No, I was focussing on getting Paramedics here and trying to save the victim. Can you try talking to the ~y~witnesses~w~ and I'll control the scene?
Sure.
That is all I have for you!
Hello sir, are you okay?
Hello Officer. Yes, I'm fine. That poor guy, I hope he's okay!
Did you see how this accident happened?
No, unfortunately. I was the second person to arrive. The woman over there was the first person on scene.
Okay, thanks for your help.
Glad to help, officer.
Sorry, but I don't know anything else.
Hello. Are you the one who called 911?
Yes officer. I saw the accident and decided to pull over and call for an ambulance!
Can you tell me what happened?
~w~ went speeding around this turn and hit the cyclist, and didn't even stop! They kept on going!
PLACEHOLDER
PLACEHOLDER
Thanks for your information. Your help is extremely useful in this investigation.
No problem! Glad to help the police any day of the week.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hey Partner. What happened here?
Hi. Thanks for responding. Seems to be a Hit and Run.
Okay. Do you have any information on a possible vehicle or suspect?
I can't tell you. Paramedics were already performing CPR when we arrived. Talk to this person here. Maybe he knows more
Thanks, I will so.
That is all I have for you!
Hello sir, are you okay?
Hello Officer. Yes, I'm fine. Is the biker okay?
I don't have any information about his condition. Did you see how this accident happened?
Yes, that's the reason why I had to pull into the grass. A car overtook me on the bridge.
Do you have a description on a license plate number of the car?
Sorry, everything went so fast, I can't remember either the car or a plate.
Try talking to the woman. She stopped and called for the EMS, maybe she knows more.
Hello. Are you the one who called 911?
Yes officer. I saw the accident and decided to pull over and call for an ambulance!
Can you tell me what happened?
~w~ overtook the car on the bridge! The biker had to swerve to avoid hitting this idiot and went off.
PLACEHOLDER
PLACEHOLDER
Thanks for your information. Your help is extremely useful in this investigation.
No problem! Glad to help the police any day of the week.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
